title: Obrolan Cuaca Harian
opening: Halo! Selamat pagi. Cuaca hari ini bagaimana?

t1.prompt: Halo! Selamat pagi. Cuaca hari ini bagaimana?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello! (hah-lo) Good morning. (se-lah-mat pah-gee) How's the weather today?

t2_good.prompt: Oh, cuaca cerah/bagus ya. Bagus sekali! Ada rencana apa hari ini?
t2_good.promptTranslation: Oh, the weather is sunny/good. Very good! (bah-goos se-ka-li) Do you have any plans today?

t2_bad.prompt: Oh, hujan ya? Sayang sekali. Apakah Anda punya payung?
t2_bad.promptTranslation: Oh, rainy (hoo-jan)? What a pity! (sa-yang se-ka-li) Do you have an umbrella?

t3_plan_yes.prompt: Bagus! Semoga cuaca mendukung rencana Anda. Anda suka musim apa di Indonesia?
t3_plan_yes.promptTranslation: Good! I hope the weather supports your plans. What season do you like in Indonesia?

t3_plan_no.prompt: Betul, di rumah saja lebih nyaman kalau cuaca tidak bagus. Ngomong-ngomong, Anda tahu tentang musim di Indonesia?
t3_plan_no.promptTranslation: True, staying home is more comfortable if the weather isn't good. By the way, do you know about the seasons in Indonesia?

t3_umbrella_yes.prompt: Bagus kalau sudah siap! Jangan sampai kehujanan ya. Musim hujan di sini memang sering begitu.
t3_umbrella_yes.promptTranslation: Good if you're ready! Don't get caught in the rain. The rainy season (moo-sim hoo-jan) here is often like that.

t3_umbrella_no.prompt: Saya punya payung lebih. Hujan deras bisa tiba-tiba datang. Musim hujan di sini memang sering begitu.
t3_umbrella_no.promptTranslation: I have an extra umbrella. Heavy rain can suddenly come. The rainy season (moo-sim hoo-jan) here is often like that.

t4_season_discussion.prompt: Indonesia hanya punya dua musim: musim hujan dan musim kemarau. Sekarang sedang musim hujan.
t4_season_discussion.promptTranslation: Indonesia only has two seasons: the rainy season (moo-sim hoo-jan) and the dry season (moo-sim ke-ma-rau). It's the rainy season now.

t4_end.prompt: Senang ngobrol dengan Anda tentang cuaca. Semoga hari Anda menyenangkan!
t4_end.promptTranslation: Nice talking with you about the weather. (se-nang ngob-rol de-ngan an-da ten-tang chu-ah-cha) Have a pleasant day!

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, saya kurang mengerti. Bisa diulang?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I don't quite understand. Could you repeat that?
